name: yet-ai
description: Yet AI local runtime host for VS Code.

yetai.runtimeUrl.description: Local Yet AI runtime URL used by the webview shell. Only loopback URLs should be used.

yetai.sessionToken.description: Optional local runtime bearer/session token passed to the webview shell for debug connections. Do not store provider API keys here.

yetai.guiDevUrl.description: Optional loopback GUI dev server URL for extension development. Leave empty to use packaged GUI assets or the built-in shell placeholder.

yetai.launchMode.description: Runtime startup mode. auto launches a discovered/configured local engine binary when available, connect only checks the configured loopback runtime, and launch requires a binary.

yetai.engineBinaryPath.description: Optional absolute path to the local yet-lsp engine binary. When set with auto or launch mode, the extension starts it with a per-session token.

scripts.compile: npm run check:identity && npm run check:webview-safety && tsc -p .
scripts.prepare:preview: npm run copy:gui && npm run compile
